arts.ttl: Gazzetta: Zirkzee wants to leave Manchester United
arts.sum: Juventus are intensifying their efforts to sign Joshua Zirkzee from Manchester United as they aim to bolster their squad and secure a Champions League qualification spot. The Dutch striker, who has struggled to find his footing in the Premier League, is a top target for Juventus manager Thiago Motta, who previously worked with Zirkzee at Bologna. The post Gazzetta: Zirkzee wants to leave Manchester United appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Final Score: Will Liverpool worsen Man Utd's troubles?
arts.sum: Final Score pundits Martin Keown and Anita Asante discuss Man Utd's Premier League season so far and how they may set up against Arne Slot's Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Liverpool GREEN LIGHT transfer that DEVASTATES Man Utd
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to come to a loan agreement with Napoli for the transfer of Federico Chiesa to the Serie A side this month. Chiesa’s agent Fali Ramadani held talks with Liverpool last week, with the Reds agreeing to allow the player to go away on loan until the summer with the idea that he will continue at Anfield from next summer.

arts.ttl: ‘I’m told’: What sources close to Trent Alexander-Arnold are now saying after Real Madrid offer – journalist
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has been in the headlines quite a lot so far in 2025. Real Madrid made an offer for Alexander-Arnold earlier this week as...

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Man United postponement latest - weather warning, UK snow and Met Office forecast
arts.sum: Liverpool news as Arne Slot's men are due to face Manchester United at Anfield on Sunday evening but the match could be in doubt due to a weather warning and the forecast for snow

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's Liverpool assistant 'makes decision on his future after interest from Championship club' in appointing him as their new manager
arts.sum: Slot has taken to life at Anfield like a duck to water since being appointed as Jurgen Klopp's successor in the summer, winning 14 of his 18 Premier League games and losing just one to date.

arts.ttl: Liverpool reject Ipswich & Palace bids for Doak - gossip
arts.sum: Scotland winger subject of interest as Kieran Tierney return to Celtic speculation continues.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher's dream Liverpool January transfer takes step closer as 'deal agreed'
arts.sum: Bournemouth have agreed a deal to sign left-back Julio Soler, boosting Liverpool's chances of sealing a deal for Cherries defender Milos Kerkez in the January transfer window

arts.ttl: Body language expert reveals Mohammed Salah Liverpool truth after admission made
arts.sum: Body language expert Darren Stanton has offered his view on Mohammed Salah's Liverpool future after the Egyptian's recent interview with Sky Sports

arts.ttl: Can you be a Liverpool legend after playing for Man Utd?
arts.sum: Former Liverpool and Manchester United striker Michael Owen talks to BBC Sport's Dion Dublin about the rivalry between the two clubs and what it is like to have a foot in both camps.
